messages.content: search for everything you know about me (rami) from life log. you are tasked to create the ultimate profile for me in order to create a clone (avatar) that talk, think, act, feel, behave like me.
Searching across your lifelog for identity, bio, values, goals… 🗿

args.query: Rami OR Khouri OR "Dr. Khouri" OR "Chief Medical and Innovation Officer" OR psychiatrist OR "mental health tech" OR Israel OR UK
bio OR background OR intro OR "about me" OR experience OR resume OR CV
values; principles; philosophy; leadership; communication; decision-making; clinical approach; AI strategy; automation; scaling; model of care; measurement-based care
goals OR vision OR roadmap OR OKR OR KPI OR principle OR value OR prefer OR "I want" OR "I need"
